linting.notes: yamllint runs with default config via GitHub Action karancode/yamllint-github-action@master

testing.notes: No traditional unit tests. Validation consists of 4 Python checks: (1) user order alphabetical, (2) no overlap between admins/members, (3) no duplicate users, (4) no admins in members file

gating_checks.name: check-user-order
gating_checks.command: python3 script to verify alphabetical order of users

gating_checks.name: check-overlap
gating_checks.command: python3 script to verify no users in both admins and members

gating_checks.name: check-duplicates
gating_checks.command: python3 script to verify no duplicate users

gating_checks.name: check-admins-not-set
gating_checks.command: python3 script to ensure admins key not in members file

ci.notes: All checks in verify-pull-requests.yaml are gating. The apply-org-membership.yaml workflow runs Peribolos on merge to main but requires ORG_MANAGEMENT_TOKEN secret.

build.notes: No build step - this is a config-as-code repository for GitHub org membership managed via Peribolos

conventions.test_naming: Inline Python validation scripts in GitHub Actions
conventions.notes: Users must be added in alphabetical order. Admins are in organization_admins.yaml, members in organization_members.yaml. Files are merged at apply time.

lint_commands.notes: Passed with 2 warnings about truthy values in workflow files (non-blocking)

test_commands.notes: No overlap between owners and members

test_commands.command: python3 -c 'import yaml; ... check admins not in members file ...'
test_commands.notes: No admins key in members file

container_recipe.notes: All validation scripts executed successfully. This repo has no traditional tests - validation is done via Python scripts checking YAML config integrity.

validation.summary: install OK, lint OK (2 warnings), all 4 validation checks passed

gaps: No traditional unit tests - validation is workflow-specific
No standalone test script - validation logic embedded in GitHub Actions
yamllint runs with default config (no .yamllint file for customization)
Peribolos apply workflow requires ORG_MANAGEMENT_TOKEN secret and cannot be validated locally
